# criblio_commit (Resource)

Commit Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "criblio_commit" "my_commit" {
  effective = true
  files = [
    "groups/default/local/cribl/pipelines/http_input/conf.yml",
    "groups/default/local/cribl/routes.yml",
  ]
  group = "default"
  message = "Update Route and Pipeline for HTTP Sources"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tools/codegen -->
## Schema

### Required

- `message` (String)

### Optional

- `effective` (Boolean)
- `files` (List of String)
- `group` (String) Worker Group to commit changes for.

## Import

Import is not supported for this action resource.
